banners.title: Welcome to Latexify

testimonials.content: Latexify's template migrator saved me weeks of reformatting when my paper was transferred between journals. The UI is incredibly clean.
testimonials.name: Dr. Elena Rostova

testimonials.content: The AI Peer Reviewer caught several logical gaps in my methodology section before submission. An absolute game-changer for solo researchers.
testimonials.name: James Chen

testimonials.content: I've moved my entire lab to Latexify. Collaborative writing is finally seamless, and the Doc2Latex feature means my undergrads can contribute easily.
testimonials.name: Prof. Sarah Jenkins

how_it_works.description: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card required.
how_it_works.title: Sign Up

how_it_works.description: Write, edit, and collaborate in real-time with co-authors from anywhere.
how_it_works.title: Create & Collaborate

how_it_works.description: Export to PDF, share links, or submit directly to journals with confidence.

features.description: A modern, powerful, collaborative LaTeX editor designed for the web. Write with joy, compile with speed, share with ease.
features.title: Latexify Dashboard

features.description: Instantly convert Word documents into clean, well-structured LaTeX code. Bridge the gap with co-authors seamlessly.
features.title: Doc2Latex

features.description: Create beautiful TikZ diagrams with an intuitive visual canvas. No more wrestling with coordinates and syntax.
features.title: Diagram Studio

features.description: Switch journals effortlessly. One click updates your document styling, margins, and bibliography formats instantly.
features.title: Template Migrator

features.description: Manage your bibliography seamlessly. Auto-fetch metadata via DOI, organize references with tags and export BibTeX.
features.title: Citation Studio

features.description: Get instant, scholarly feedback on clarity, argumentation, and methodology. Like having a senior researcher on speed dial.
features.title: AI Peer Reviewer

benefits.description: Cloud-powered LaTeX cluster compiles your manuscript in under 3 seconds. No local installation needed.
benefits.title: Lightning-Fast Compilation

benefits.description: AES-256 encrypted storage with isolated project namespaces. Your research stays private.
benefits.title: Enterprise-Grade Security

benefits.description: Browser-based IDE works on any device. Start on your laptop, continue on your tablet.
benefits.title: Works Everywhere

benefits.description: Invite co-authors, share links, and review changes together in real time.
benefits.title: Real-time Collaboration
